description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof, white exterior walls, and a prominent attached garage at the front. The property is surrounded by a white picket fence and features a paved driveway leading to the garage, as well as a manicured front lawn with several mature trees and shrubs. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by additional greenery and a small patio area. Windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, with the front facade displaying a balanced, traditional look. The main entryway is slightly recessed, flanked by bushes, and features a simple door with minimal ornamentation. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, emphasizing symmetry and clean lines.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof, attached garage, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with a pool and mature landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, paved driveway, and manicured front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white fence, side yard, and the gable end of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard swimming pool, patio area, and symmetrical rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fence, side yard, and partial view of the pool and patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, minimal ornamentation, and flanked by bushes.
